case_title: SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL VS. FRIDA RAPOPORT

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-15-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RAPOPORT, FRIDA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL AS TO DEFENDANT RAPOPORT, FRIDA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DANIEL SHIVER, ACCOUNTING MANAGER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAPOPORT, FRIDA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,065.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT OWES THE DEMANDED AMOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL AS TO DEFENDANT RAPOPORT, FRIDA
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.
